case_title: OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. CLISYA PADUA BIANCHI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 11/22/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $922.75 FILED BY OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT BIANCHI, CLISYA PADUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 8/16/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIANCHI, CLISYA PADUA $882.74 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $997.74, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE THE PAYMENTS DUE AS ORDERED, THE FULL AMOUNT SHALL BECOME DUE AND PAYABLE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-15-18 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-22-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY, REPRESENTED BY SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUL-08-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIANCHI, CLISYA PADUA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT CLISYA PADUA BIANCHI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
